// note: Compiles the FULLY SELF-CONTAINED Three-Point Shootout (web/src/*.ts, including its own pure-TS engine under web/src/engine/) to web/dist/*.js via tsgo. There are no external imports — no @axiom/game, no wasm — so no path mappings are needed; every import is relative. Tests (*.test.ts) are excluded — they run under `node --test` with native TS type-stripping (no DOM), so they need no compile here.
